description_long: This is a halved Hass avocado with its pit still embedded in the creamy, pale green flesh. The outer skin is dark, almost black, with a rough, bumpy texture characteristic of ripe avocados. The flesh is smooth and transitions from a light yellow-green near the pit to a deeper green closer to the skin. The pit is large, round, and mottled brown, sitting snugly in the center cavity. There are minor blemishes and natural irregularities on the skin, and a small sticker is visible on one side. The avocado is displayed isolated on a white background, with no visible stem attached.
description: A halved, ripe Hass avocado with a rough, dark skin and creamy green flesh, pit intact. Minor blemishes and a sticker are visible on the skin.
description_view_0: The avocado half is shown with the pit prominent and a sticker visible on the lower right of the skin.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the pit and the smooth, creamy flesh, with the skin's rough texture clearly visible.
description_view_2: The pit is more centered in this view, and the skin's bumpy surface is in focus, with no sticker visible.
description_view_3: The pit is seen from a slightly different angle, and the transition of flesh color from yellow-green to dark green is clear.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and rough patches
